tasks.label: Publish: Alpha → Beta (develop → staging)
tasks.command: git checkout staging && git -c core.editor=true merge --no-ff --no-edit develop -m "Publish tested changes" && git push origin staging && git checkout develop && echo Done: develop merged into staging and pushed.

tasks.label: Publish: Beta → Production (staging → main)
tasks.command: git checkout main && git -c core.editor=true merge --no-ff --no-edit staging -m "Beta testing completed, now deploying to live" && git push origin main && git checkout develop && echo Done: staging merged into main and pushed.
